bioOverride: Founder of Pixelnauts who describes himself as "clinically insane" and yeets random things, with a background in finance and accounting; he posts quirky emoji experiments, meme reactions to tech/news (like AI agents or taxes), and casual community engagements tied to his NFT/creative ventures.

name: New
bioOverride: Collector of digital artifacts, multidisciplinary artist, and meme maxi who tells stories through shared experiences; he shares humorous visuals, GM replies, and appreciative comments on fine art photography like northern lights or scenic shots.
